description: Rubix God-Agent core memories â€” code quality patterns, architecture analysis, threat model review, setup guide. Import via scripts/migrate-memories-json.mjs.

entries.content:
CODEQUALITY_PATTERNS|cross-instance|9sessions.5instances(Forge.Axis.Trace.Loom.Spark)|Feb2026|provenâ†’real_bugs+time_saved

1|DEFENSIVE_PARSE|JSON.parse.parseInt.lookupâ†’check empty.null.undefined first|existsSyncâ†’true for 0-byte|FK may be null|`if(!raw||raw.trim().length===0)return defaultValue`

2|RENAME_COORD|rename key.var.fnâ†’(a)grep ALL files frmdev+frmcloud(b)remove alias/shim not update(c)god_comms_broadcast type=breaking_change(d)check version before bump

3|NO_HARDCODED_IDX|arr[arr.length-1]â†’last|arr[arr.length-2]â†’2nd-last|hardcode only idx 0 or fixed-size|polyline endpoints move on elbow add

4|CSS_SPECIFICITY|shorthand `border:1px #000 solid` high-specâ†’overrides ALL individual border-style.border-color low-spec|use CSS vars or match specificity

5|DUAL_ENV_SYNC|frmcloudâ†”frmdev mirror all changes|ls verify paths before edit|check version current before bump

6|CACHE_BUST|JS.CSS changeâ†’version bump PoleFunctions.php wp_enqueue_script.wp_enqueue_style|both envs

7|NONCE_MISMATCH|wp_create_nonce('action')â†’JS AJAXâ†’PHP check_ajax_referer('action')|exact same string all 3|copy handlerâ†’update nonce action

8|MYSQL_MIGRATE|populated cols type conversion:(1)ALTER allow NULL(2)UPDATE invalidâ†’NULL(3)ALTER enforce final type|direct ALTER fails empty stringâ†’DECIMAL

9|LOCAL_STATE_MIRROR|AJAX write save entityâ†’must update local JS obj|else same-session readâ†’stale from window.entities[id]

10|O(NÂ˛)_TRAP|bulk ops(style.DOM reflow.re-render)â†’run ONCE after loop|`items.forEach(addItem);applyAllStyles();`â†’not inside loop

CODEQUALITY_PATTERNS_V2|cross-instance|Feb2026_reflection_2|patterns_11-18|provenâ†’real_bugs

11|ADD_REMOVE_SYMMETRY|saveâ†’delete MUST mirror all steps|photo:upload called updatePhotoCountMarker,delete didn'tâ†’stale badge|shape:save wrote 13 meta keys,delete cleaned 7â†’orphans|RULE:grep save fn for update_post_meta/add_post_metaâ†’match in delete fn

12|WP_CONTEXT_AWARENESS|standalone PHP(no WP bootstrap)â†’wp_die/status_header/wp_send_json=FATAL|payment.php+fileCabinetDownload.php=standalone|use http_response_code()+exit()+header()|RULE:verify require wp-load.php before wp_* fn

13|META_KEY_NAMING_COLLISION|new key substring matches existing strpos filtersâ†’inflated counts|trashed keys(image-file-42-trashed-url) matched strpos('image-file')|RULE:grep strpos/regex before creating meta key

14|VERSION_COLLISION_AVOIDANCE|other instance may have bumped version|Traceâ†’1.0.9 but Axis used 1.0.9|RULE:grep wp_enqueue_script PoleFunctions.php before version choice

15|WP_META_CACHE_PRIMING|foreach($posts)+get_post_meta()â†’update_meta_cache('post',$ids) BEFORE loop|N queriesâ†’1|if get_post_meta($id) called(all meta),use array not get_post_meta($id,$key)|array_diff cached IDs before priming

16|EXISTING_ENDPOINT_REUSE|before new bulk endpointâ†’check existing import/export|KML upload reused bulk_import_features from CSVâ†’zero PHP changes|RULE:grep wp_ajax Plugin_Core.php first

17|SILENT_FAILURE_DATA_LOSS|empty .done().fail().always()=data loss risk|saveDrop() frm-address-system.js empty callbacks|21 instances codebase|RULE:every .fail()â†’console.error()+user notification minimum

18|STANDALONE_PHP_ENTRY_POINTS|.php URL-reachable without WP bootstrap=security surface|found:payment.php.fileCabinetDownload.php.run-migration.php.generate_zip.php|RULE:standalone PHP must bootstrap WP+check auth OR neutralize/delete

ANALYSIS|RUBIX|Feb2026|Forge-Inst1

METRICS|249ts.40dir.83733LOC|mcp-server.ts=12844LOC|134tools.25deps

P1-SIMPLICITY|C-|mcp-server.ts 64.6% accidental: dual-schema-Zod+JSON=4312L.boilerplate=2385L.switch=400L.passthrough=1200L|real-logic=3500L(27%)|target=5K|GNN=1303L-dead:2MB-alloc.null-embed.untrained

P5-MINIMAL-FOUNDATIONS|D+|WEAKEST|9-non-core: EARNED=deepwork|WIRED-not-auto=adversarial.curiosity.distillation.gnn.discovery.reflexion.pattern|SPECULATIVE=visualization(0-imports)|BROKEN: setReflexionService().setShadowSearch()â†’never-called

P2-STEPWISE|B+|EARNED: CausalDetector.MemRL.Comms.PhasedExecutor|ISSUE: unfinished-wired-nonfunctional

P6-SINGLE-OP-COMPREHENSION|B-|CLAUDE.md=excellent|ISSUES: 40dir-surface.12.8K-barrier.earned-vs-wired-undocumented

P7-BOOTSTRAP|A|daily-builds: pole-plugin.frmcloud.others|multi-instance: memory+codex+comms|shadow-search-Stop=quality-inspector

P8-RESULTS|C|134toolsâ†’~25active.~109speculative|30+capability-tools=identical-passthrough

P9-ESSENTIAL-VS-EPHEMERAL|A-|RUBIX-coreâ†”products-independent

P10-TOOL-SHAPES-THOUGHT|B+|shadow-search-Stop=strongest-P10|ISSUE: lives-in-Claude-hooks-not-MCPâ†’most-Wirth-aligned=accidentally-external

ACTIONS|T1-REMOVE: GNN(1303L).visualization(346L).pattern(507L)|T2-FIX: reflexionâ†’SelfHealer-OR-cut.shadowâ†’AlternativesFinder-OR-cut|T3-REDUCE: tool-registry-patternâ†’mcp-server.ts(12.8Kâ†’5K)|T4-EARN: curiosity-auto-scheduler-OR-remove.distillation-auto-trigger-OR-document

CODE_REVIEW|THREAT_MODEL_REEVAL|2026-02-15|Loom4

CONTEXT|system serves logged-in engineers.draftsmen only|not public

CHALLENGE|user disputed 8 BLOCKER priority|forced threat model revision

INSIGHT|"security fixes prevent what if insiders aren't threat?"

ANALYSIS|
1|ALL 116 AJAX handlers=wp_ajax_* only|single nopriv ref COMMENTED OUT|WP requires login pre-AJAX
2|6 AJAX BLOCKERs (SEC-03â†’SEC-08) internal-only|nonces protect CSRF.privesc|low-prob for trusted team
3|2 genuinely internet-facing: fileCabinetDownload.php+payment.php=standalone|NO WP auth|real risk

DECISION|downgrade 6 AJAX itemsâ†’MEDIUM|keep 2 standaloneâ†’CRITICAL
OUTCOME|user agreedâ†’focused effort on real attack surface

GUIDE|RUBIX-GOD-AGENT-TWIN|fresh-install-clone

PREREQ|Node-v20+|npm-v11+

STEP1|CLONE-BUILD|
cd /var/www/htmlâ†’git clone git@github.com:BobbyRuby/rubix-protocol.gitâ†’cd rubix-protocolâ†’npm installâ†’npm run buildâ†’mkdir -p data
BUILD|tscâ†’cp src/storage/schema.sql dist/storage/â†’cp src/communication/comms-schema.sql dist/communication/

STEP2|MCP-CFG|.claude/mcp.json@TARGET-ROOT
mcpServers.YOUR-BRAIN-NAME|cmd:node|args:dist/mcp-server.js|cwd:/path/to/rubix-protocol
ENV|OPENAI_API_KEY:req(embeddings.text-embedding-3-small.768d)|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:req(Claude-codegen-CODEX)|RUBIX_DATA_DIR:./data|RUBIX_PROJECT_ROOT:/path/to/target/project|RUBIX_PROJECT_NAME:human-readable

STEP3|SETTINGS|.claude/settings.json@TARGET-ROOT
perms.allow|Bash.Read.Edit.Write.WebFetch.WebSearch.git-add/commit/push
perms.deny|rm.rmdir.sudo-rm/rmdir.git-rm.git-branch-D.git-push-force.git-reset-hard.git-checkout--
enableAllProjectMcpServers:true
HOOKS|7-total@scripts/
UserPromptSubmitâ†’rubix-recall-hook.cjs(30)|PermissionRequestâ†’rubix-permission-hook.cjs(400)|Notificationâ†’rubix-notification-hook.cjs(5)|Stopâ†’rubix-comms-stop-hook.cjs(15)|PreToolUse[EnterPlanMode]â†’rubix-plan-hook.cjs(5000)|PostToolUse[Write|Edit|Bash]â†’rubix-stm-hook.cjs(2)|SessionEndâ†’rubix-session-end-hook.cjs(10)

STEP4|LOCAL-CFG|.claude/settings.local.json(gitignored)
perms.allow:["mcp__YOUR-BRAIN-NAME__*"]|enabledMcpjsonServers:["YOUR-BRAIN-NAME"]

STEP5|CLAUDE.md|ships-w-repo|MEMORY.mdâ†’~/.claude/projects/<path-hash>/memory/MEMORY.md(team-creates)

STEP6|RESTART|toolsâ†’mcp__YOUR-BRAIN-NAME__god_*|data-dir(memory.db.comms.db.vectors.hnsw)â†’auto-create@first-startup

KEYS|shared-account-level
OPENAI|sk-proj-YOUR_OPENAI_KEY_HERE
ANTHROPIC|sk-ant-YOUR_ANTHROPIC_KEY_HERE
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN|optional(daemon-mode)
